name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
This year's exploding shoulder bag is finally here from YSL!!️
When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. The inspiration comes from the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", telling the story of the 5-7 PM between work and home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking stiff but not too sharp.
Paired with the brand's iconic insert buckle, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm,
Model: 2024 Crocodile Grain Original Leather
